patterns.description: Adding methods to CacheService interface breaks all partial mocks in test files that create CacheService without the new methods
patterns.fix: Created dedicated fix agent to add zadd/ztop stubs to all CacheService mocks (4 files fixed: cache.fixtures, token-cleanup, search-museums, daily-chat-limit)

patterns.description: Adding inline cache invalidation logic in setMessageFeedback exceeded ESLint complexity limit (16 > 15)
patterns.fix: Extracted invalidateCacheForFeedback() private method to reduce cyclomatic complexity

pattern.phase: string — which phase it occurred in
pattern.fix: string — how it was fixed or mitigated
pattern.occurrences: number — how many times this pattern recurred

_schema._note: Agents read unfixed patterns at spawn to avoid repeating. Tech Lead records after each corrective loop.
